title: AIIMS Nagpur – Junior Resident – 32 Posts
shortInfo: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) Recruitment 2026 for 32 posts of Junior Resident (Non-Academic). Candidates with MBBS Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 15-05-2026, and closes on 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through AIIMS Nagpur official website aiimsnagpur.edu.in.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Nagpur Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 32 Posts
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) Recruitment 2026 for 32 posts of Junior Resident (Non-Academic). Candidates with MBBS Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 15-05-2026, and closes on 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through AIIMS Nagpur official website aiimsnagpur.edu.in.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS (including completion of Internship) or equivalent degree recognized by NMC/State Registration

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Nagpur Junior Resident (Non-Academic) Recruitment 2026.
